title: tagetes coronopifolia
intro: Tagetes coronopifolia, also known as Mexican Marigold or White Marigold, is a perennial plant native to Mexico that belongs to the Asteraceae family. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties, making it a natural remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Tagetes coronopifolia include reducing pain and inflammation, treating wounds and skin conditions, and supporting digestive health. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
